_meta.purpose: Emotional sentences in English for Brite Smile Dental Care. Adds warmth and human feel. Used selectively. Dental anxiety → relief is the core emotion.
rules: Dental-specific emotions: fear before, relief after, smile confidence
Family angle works — brought kids, came with parent, referred relatives
Short punchy sentences work better than long emotional speeches

5star: Haven't been able to eat properly in weeks — after this visit, sorted.
My kid actually said she wasn't scared — that alone is a win.
The confidence in my smile has genuinely changed since coming here.
Avoided dentists for years because of anxiety. This place changed that.
Slept properly for the first time in days after the treatment.
My mother was very nervous about her procedure — she left smiling.
Something as simple as eating without pain — you don't realise how much you miss it.
The relief after weeks of toothache is honestly indescribable.
So glad I didn't keep postponing this.
Small procedure, massive difference in quality of life.
Used to hide my smile in photos. Not anymore.
The fear I had built up in my head was completely unnecessary.
My whole family noticed the difference in me after just one visit.
Wish I had come here years ago instead of avoiding the dentist.
That one appointment fixed something I had been living with for months.
Missing that tooth for months, now I actually smile in photos again.
4star: Feeling better than when I started, which is what matters.
Glad I decided to come here.
The improvement is real even if gradual.
Feeling more at ease about dental visits now.
Overall feeling positive about the treatment.
3star: Hoping for good results going forward.
Let's see how the treatment progresses.
